<!--
  PR format (required — see AGENTS.md § Pull requests). Keep this body LEAN.
  Badges: shields.io; include ONLY those that apply. Link CI to its run.
  proof grade: bronze = tests/gate green (unfalsifiable text) · silver = a screenshot of the feature
  actually running · gold = end-to-end vs real data. The proof screenshot goes INSIDE the Proof cell
  (drag it in — do NOT commit it to the repo).
  Anything non-obvious → an inline review comment on the diff, NOT this body.
  Use header-less HTML tables (below), not markdown tables (which force an empty header row).
-->

</table>

<tr><td><strong>Problem</strong></td><td>&lt;max 50 words&gt;</td></tr>
<tr><td><strong>Solution</strong></td><td>&lt;max 50 words&gt;</td></tr>
